items.title: JonesTrading Highlights Differentiated Pipeline at Atai Beckley N.V. (ATAI)
items.description: Atai Beckley N.V. (NASDAQ:ATAI) is among the Best Get Rich Fast Stocks to Buy Right Now. On December 23, Justin Walsh from JonesTrading initiated coverage on Atai Beckley N.V. (NASDAQ:ATAI) with a ‘Buy’ rating and a price target of $16, according to TheFly. This translates to an upside potential of nearly 282%. According to the […]
